calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-24-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES ON WED., JUN-22-2011: RESPONDENTS MS. TRELAWNY S. DIAL AND ANGELIQUE BRUNNER PRESENT FOR TRIAL DE NOVO THIS DAY; THERE IS NO APPEARANCE BY OR FOR APPELLANT MR. ERIK TERRERI THIS DATE. BOTH RESPONDENTS ARE ADMINISTERED THE OATH BY THE CLERK.

THE COURT TAKES THE BENCH AND HEARS TESTIMONY PRESENTED OFF THE RECORD. THEREUPON, THE COURT ENTERS A DEFAULT AGAINST APPELLANT AND A PROVE-UP HEARING IS CONDUCTED; THE COURT SIGNS A JUDGMENT IN OPEN COURT IN FAVOR OF RESPONDENTS AND AGAINST APPELLANT ERIK TERRERI IN THE AMOUNT OF $512.09 PRINCIPAL, $559.40 AS PER CCP 1033.5, AND INTEREST IN THE AMOUNT OF $29.18, FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT OF $1,100.67. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.

JUDGE: HON. LINDA H. COLFAX; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED.
